= Contents =
    - [[#tips & tricks|tips & tricks]]
        - [[#tips & tricks#downgrade package|downgrade package]]
        - [[#tips & tricks#prevent package from upgrading|prevent package from upgrading]]
        - [[#tips & tricks#multi-user system|multi-user system]]

= tips & tricks =

== downgrade package ==
`brew search <package name>`
Older/specific versions are marked with `@`
{{{
    brew install <package>@<version>
    brew unlink <old package>
    brew link --force --overwrite <new package>
}}}
Also it's a good idea to [[#prevent package from upgrading|prevent package from upgrading]]

== prevent package from upgrading ==
`brew pin <package>`

== multi-user system ==
{{{
    chgrp -R admin /usr/local/*
    chmod -R g+w /usr/local/*
}}
